lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਦਿ ਬਹਾਲੈ ਆਪੇ ਵਿਦਾ ਕਰਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape sangat sad bahaalai aape vidaa karaavai |
lines.english: He Himself calls and seats the congregation, and He Himself bids them goodbye.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜਲੁ ਆਪੇ ਦੇ ਛਿੰਗਾ ਆਪੇ ਚੁਲੀ ਭਰਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape jal aape de chhingaa aape chulee bharaavai |
lines.english: He Himself is the water, He Himself gives the tooth-pick, and He Himself offers the mouthwash.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕਿਰਪਾਲੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮਨਾਵੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jis no kirapaal hovai har aape tis no hukam manaavai |6|
lines.english: One whom the Lord Himself blesses with His Mercy - the Lord causes him to walk according to His Will. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਸਭਿ ਬੰਧਨਾ ਪਾਪ ਪੁੰਨ ਸਨਬੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: karam dharam sabh bandhanaa paap pun sanabandh |
lines.english: Rituals and religions are all just entanglements; bad and good are bound up with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਮਤਾ ਮੋਹੁ ਸੁ ਬੰਧਨਾ ਪੁਤ੍ਰ ਕਲਤ੍ਰ ਸੁ ਧੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: mamataa mohu su bandhanaa putr kalatr su dhandh |
lines.english: Those things done for the sake of children and spouse, in ego and attachment, are just more bonds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਜੇਵਰੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾ ਸਨਬੰਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhaa teh jevaree maaeaa kaa sanabandh |
lines.english: Wherever I look, there I see the noose of attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਵਰਤਣਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਅੰਧੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sache naam bin varatan varatai andh |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the True Name, the world is engrossed in blind entanglements. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੇ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਤਾ ਥੀਐ ਜਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਰਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: andhe chaanan taa theeai jaa satigur milai rajaae |
lines.english: The blind receive the Divine Light, when they merge with the Will of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਦੇਖੈ ਤਿਸੈ ਕਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਆ ਤਨੁ ਸਾਜਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh dekhai tisai kaa jin keea tan saaj |
lines.english: They see that everything belongs to the One who created and fashioned the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਨ ਤੋੜੈ ਸਚਿ ਵਸੈ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅਧੇਰਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bandhan torrai sach vasai agiaan adheraa jaae |
lines.english: They break their bonds, and dwell in Truth, and the darkness of ignorance is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਦਹੁ ਆਪੇ ਥਾਟੁ ਕੀਆ ਬਹਿ ਕਰਤੈ ਤਦਹੁ ਪੁਛਿ ਨ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਬੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: jadahu aape thaatt keea beh karatai tadahu puchh na sevak beea |
lines.english: When the Creator, sitting all by Himself, created the Universe, he did not consult with any of His servants;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਕਰਤਾਰ ਕੀ ਕਰਤਾ ਰਾਖੈ ਲਾਜ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak saran karataar kee karataa raakhai laaj |2|
lines.english: Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of the Creator - the Creator preserves his honor. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਦਹੁ ਕਿਆ ਕੋ ਲੇਵੈ ਕਿਆ ਕੋ ਦੇਵੈ ਜਾਂ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: tadahu kiaa ko levai kiaa ko devai jaan avar na doojaa keea |
lines.english: so what can anyone take, and what can anyone give, when He did not create any other like Himself?

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ਕਰਤੈ ਦਾਨੁ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਉ ਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: fir aape jagat upaaeaa karatai daan sabhanaa kau deea |
lines.english: Then, after fashioning the world, the Creator blessed all with His blessings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸੇਵ ਬਣਾਈਅਨੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape sev banaaeean guramukh aape amrit peea |
lines.english: He Himself instructs us in His service, and as Gurmukh, we drink in His Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸਦ ਸਾਚਾ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh prabh seveh sad saachaa anadin sehaj piaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs serve God forever; night and day, they are steeped in the Love of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ਆਕਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੇ ਕਰੈ ਸੁ ਥੀਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: aap nirankaar aakaar hai aape aape karai su theea |7|
lines.english: He Himself is formless, and He Himself is formed; whatever He Himself does, comes to pass. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦਿ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਚੇ ਅਰਧਿ ਉਰਧਿ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand gaaveh gun saache aradh uradh ur dhaar |
lines.english: They are in bliss forever, singing the Glorious Praises of the True Lord; in this world and in the next, they keep Him clasped to their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਕਰਮੁ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: antar preetam vasiaa dhur karam likhiaa karataar |
lines.english: Their Beloved dwells deep within; the Creator pre-ordained this destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਆਪੇ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak aap milaaeian aape kirapaa dhaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, He blends them into Himself; He Himself showers His Mercy upon them. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿਐ ਕਥਿਐ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਹੈ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kahiai kathiai na paaeeai anadin rahai sadaa gun gaae |
lines.english: By merely talking and speaking, He is not found. Night and day, sing His Glorious Praises continually.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਕਰਮੈ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਭਉਕਿ ਮੁਏ ਬਿਲਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vin karamai kinai na paaeo bhauk mue bilalaae |
lines.english: Without His Merciful Grace, no one finds Him; many have died barking and bewailing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਭਿਜੈ ਆਪਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad man tan bhijai aap vasai man aae |
lines.english: When the mind and body are saturated with the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the Lord Himself comes to dwell in his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree paaeeai aape le milaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, by His Grace, He is found; He unites us in His Union. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਣ ਸਭਿ ਸਾਸਤ ਆਪਿ ਕਥੈ ਆਪਿ ਭੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape ved puraan sabh saasat aap kathai aap bheejai |
lines.english: He Himself is the Vedas, the Puraanas and all the Shaastras; He Himself chants them, and He Himself is pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਪਰਵਿਰਤਿ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰਵਿਰਤੀ ਆਪੇ ਅਕਥੁ ਕਥੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: aap paravirat aap niraviratee aape akath katheejai |
lines.english: He Himself is a householder, and He Himself is a renunciate; He Himself utters the Unutterable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਬਹਿ ਪੂਜੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਪਰਪੰਚੁ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape hee beh pooje karataa aap parapanch kareejai |
lines.english: He Himself sits down to worship, and He Himself creates the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: aape sukh dukh devai karataa aape bakhas kareejai |8|
lines.english: He Himself grants pleasure and pain; the Creator Himself bestows His gifts. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਸਭੁ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ਆਪਿ ਅਲਿਪਤੁ ਵਰਤੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape pun sabh aap karaae aap alipat varateejai |
lines.english: He Himself is all goodness, and He Himself causes us to act; He Himself remains detached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭੈ ਕੇਤੇ ਨਿਸਤਰੇ ਭੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bhai kete nisatare bhai vich nirbhau paae |
lines.english: Through the Fear of the Guru, many have been saved; in this fear, find the Fearless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਖਾ ਅੰਦਰਹੁ ਜੋਰੁ ਛਡਿ ਤੂ ਭਉ ਕਰਿ ਝਲੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sekhaa andarahu jor chhadd too bhau kar jhal gavaae |
lines.english: O Shaykh, abandon your cruel nature; live in the Fear of God and give up your madness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਂਤੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਣੀ ਸਾ ਖਸਮੁ ਪਾਏ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saantee vich kaar kamaavanee saa khasam paae thaae |
lines.english: If good deeds are done in this state of peace, they are approved by the Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਕਠੋਰੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਭੇਦਿ ਤੂੰ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: man katthor sabad bhed toon saant vasai man aae |
lines.english: Pierce your stone heart with the Word of the Shabad; let peace and tranquility come to abide in your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾਮਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਪੁਛਹੁ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak kaam krodh kinai na paaeo puchhahu giaanee jaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, through sexual desire and anger, no one has ever found God - go, and ask any wise man. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:
